text:
EXPLANATION: The paper was found as a NeurIPS 2025 AI4Science Workshop poster and a submission to ICLR 2026 on OpenReview with the exact title and author list provided.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=uN6J7o071A
FOUND_TITLE: MEGA: A Large-Scale Molecular Editing Dataset for Guided-Action Optimization
FOUND_AUTHORS: Nelson Fernandez, Maxime Illouz, Luis Pinto, Entao Yang, Habiboulaye Amadou Boubacar
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
